arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain welcome Arsenal to the French capital in the second leg of their Champions League semi-final tonight. The Parisians hold a 1-0 lead after winning the first leg at the Emirates last week, courtesy of Ousmane Dembele’s early goal.
